description: Protocol Amendment Risk Ruleset — configurable without code changes. Weights are editable. Source: expert clinical operations review + published amendment frequency literature.

rules.pattern: ECOG 0 only in solid tumour indication
rules.common_amendment: Expand to ECOG 0-1 post-activation due to slow enrollment
rules.mitigation: Consider expanding eligibility to ECOG 0-1 to increase the recruitable patient pool by ~40%.

rules.common_amendment: Remove or make optional one biopsy to reduce screen fail
rules.mitigation: Consider making at least one biopsy optional (e.g., 'if accessible') to reduce screen failure rates.

rules.common_amendment: Narrow concomitant medication exclusions to mechanistically relevant drugs only
rules.mitigation: Narrow the exclusion list to drugs with known mechanistic interaction with the study agent.

rules.pattern: Response assessment window < 6 weeks in IO trial
rules.common_amendment: Extend assessment window to 8-12 weeks to accommodate delayed IO response
rules.mitigation: Extend response assessment window to 8-12 weeks to accommodate delayed immune-mediated responses (pseudoprogression).

rules.pattern: Ambiguous language without numeric threshold in exclusion criterion
rules.common_amendment: Add numeric threshold (e.g., 'ALT > 3x ULN') to prevent inconsistent screening
rules.mitigation: Replace ambiguous language with specific numeric thresholds to ensure consistent screening across sites.

rules.pattern: Prior therapy lines threshold set to exactly first-line
rules.common_amendment: Expand to 1-2 prior lines due to rapidly changing SOC landscape
rules.mitigation: Consider expanding to 1-2 prior therapy lines to account for rapidly evolving standard-of-care treatment patterns.

rules.pattern: Lab eligibility threshold at exact ULN boundary
rules.common_amendment: Add +/-10% buffer to prevent screen failures from lab variability
rules.mitigation: Add a 10% buffer (e.g., 1.0x ULN -> 1.1x ULN) to prevent screen failures from normal lab variability.

rules.pattern: Double-blind design without sham procedure detail
rules.common_amendment: Add sham procedure protocol to maintain blind integrity
rules.mitigation: Define a sham procedure protocol (e.g., matching IV infusion) to maintain blinding integrity for the non-oral route of administration.
